enriched_points.expanded_content: Morphing wings leverage smart materials to dynamically adjust shape during flight, enhancing maneuverability and performance across various flight conditions, crucial for multi-mission aerospace vehicles.
Smart materials enhance vibration control in aircraft structures, improving stability and passenger comfort while extending the lifespan of components through effective damping mechanisms.

Smart materials enable energy harvesting from environmental vibrations and movements, providing sustainable power sources for onboard systems, thus increasing overall energy efficiency in aerospace applications.
